# [ScalaCaseClassSerializer](<ScalaCaseClassSerializer$.html> "See companion object")

###

Related Docs: [object ScalaCaseClassSerializer](<ScalaCaseClassSerializer$.html> "See companion object") | [package typeutils](<package.html>)

[ ](<../../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.typeutils.ScalaCaseClassSerializer> "Permalink")

####  class ScalaCaseClassSerializer[T <: Product] extends [CaseClassSerializer](<CaseClassSerializer.html>)[T] with SelfResolvingTypeSerializer[T]

This is a non macro-generated, concrete Scala case class serializer.

We need this serializer to replace the previously macro generated, anonymous [CaseClassSerializer](<CaseClassSerializer.html>).

Annotations
     @SerialVersionUID()
